title: Arsenal need Arteta to step up now to avoid disaster again
summary: Arsenal face mounting pressure after three consecutive Premier League runners-up finishes, with manager Mikel Arteta holding the key to the club's future. The fear of failure has become unavoidable, but his leadership decisions will be critical to whether the club can finally deliver a title.
content: The fear of failure has become unavoidable, especially after three successive runners-up finishes in the Premier League, but Mikel Arteta holds Arsenal's fate in his hands.

zh.title: 阿森纳需要阿尔特塔挺身而出以避免再次灾难
zh.summary: 阿森纳在连续三次英超亚军后面临越来越大的压力，主教练米克尔·阿尔特塔掌握着俱乐部的未来。失败的恐惧已成为不可避免，但他的领导决策对俱乐部是否最终能赢得冠军至关重要。

title: MLS Power Rankings: LAFC practically perfect atop table
summary: LAFC continues its dominant 2026 MLS season, remaining undefeated in league play with only a draw marring an otherwise perfect record. The Los Angeles side tops ESPN's latest power rankings.
content: LAFC still hasn't conceded in league play in 2026, only a draw blemishes its record this season, but it's enough to top ESPN's MLS Power Rankings.

zh.title: MLS实力排行榜：LAFC基本完美领跑积分榜
zh.summary: LAFC继续其2026赛季的统治级表现，在联赛中保持不败，只有一场平局影响了完美纪录。洛杉矶球队在ESPN最新实力排行榜中排名第一。

title: Lijnders on replacing 'unique' Silva
summary: Manchester City assistant manager Pep Lijnders addressed the future of captain Bernardo Silva, suggesting the midfielder's time at the club may be coming to an end. Lijnders remarked that "every good story comes to an end" in discussing Silva's potential departure.
content: Manchester City assistant manager Pep Lijnders discusses captain Bernardo Silva's future at the club, saying "every good story comes to an end".

zh.title: 莱因德斯谈接替"独特的"席尔瓦
zh.summary: 曼城助理教练佩普·莱因德斯谈及了队长伯纳多·席尔瓦的未来，暗示这名中场球员在俱乐部的时光可能即将结束。莱因德斯在讨论席尔瓦可能离队时表示"所有好故事都有结局"。

title: Chelsea hold talks over young forward Safi
summary: Chelsea is in negotiations to sign young forward N'Sira Safi from the Right to Dream Academy in the Ivory Coast. The signing would add to Chelsea's growing youth development strategy.
content: Chelsea hold talks over the signing of forward N'Sira Safi from the Right to Dream Academy in the Ivory Coast.

title: Fatah faces 'big decision' about future - gossip
summary: Dundee United winger Fatah is facing a crucial decision regarding his future at the club. The news comes as part of a broader roundup of weekend football reaction and transfer speculation.

summary: ESPN has released its eighth annual list of the world's best male players aged 21 or under, highlighting sport's emerging young talent. The rankings showcase the next generation of stars who could define football's future.

title: Quiz: Name every team to reach an FA Cup semi-final in the 2020s
summary: A quiz challenge asks readers to name all 14 teams that have reached the FA Cup semi-finals since 2020. The test covers nearly half a decade of English football's most prestigious domestic cup competition.
content: In total, 14 teams have reached the FA Cup's final four since 2020. Can you name them all?

title: Valverde's hunger, sacrifice and goals should have Madrid confident -- and Bayern fearful
summary: Federico Valverde's strong form and tenacity provide Real Madrid with confidence despite what has been a challenging season. His performances suggest the Spanish giant could still contend for trophies while potentially worrying Bayern Munich.
content: This has been something of a lost season for Real Madrid, but the tenacity and form of Federico Valverde may yet bring trophies to the Spanish capital.

zh.title: 瓦尔韦德的饥饿感、牺牲精神和进球应该给皇马信心——也应该让拜仁感到害怕
zh.summary: 费德里科·瓦尔韦德的强劲表现和不屈精神为皇马提供了信心，尽管这支西班牙豪门本赛季面临重重挑战。他的表现表明这支西班牙巨人仍可争夺奖杯，同时也可能令拜仁慕尼黑感到担忧。

title: Transfer rumors, news: Europe's top clubs on alert over Vinícius Jr. move
summary: Real Madrid forward Vinícius Jr. has attracted interest from multiple European powerhouses including Arsenal, Manchester United, Manchester City, Liverpool, Chelsea, PSG, and Bayern Munich. The top clubs have reportedly been contacted about a possible transfer.
content: Arsenal, Man United, Man City, Liverpool, Chelsea, PSG and Bayern have been contacted about a possible move for Real Madrid forward Vinícius Jr. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Podcast: Hearts hang on as Old Firm close gap & can the Dons avoid drop?
summary: In Scottish Premiership action, Hearts held on while Celtic and Rangers both won, narrowing the title race to just three points. The podcast discusses the tightening title race and whether Aberdeen can avoid relegation.
content: The title race closes to three points as Celtic and Rangers win and Hearts draw at Livi.

content: From Francesco Totti to Matthew Le Tissier, one-club men share a rare and special bond with the fans - we've ranked the top 10 here.

zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼在其BBC播客的最新一集中揭示了他心目中有史以来的五大运动明星。

title: Man City expect Silva's story coming 'to an end'
summary: Pep Lijnders, Manchester City's assistant manager, has strongly hinted that midfielder Bernardo Silva may leave the club at season's end, using the metaphor "every good story comes to an end." This suggests City is preparing for Silva's potential departure after a significant tenure.
content: Manchester City assistant Pep Lijnders has given the strongest hint yet that Bernardo Silva is set to leave the club at the end of the season by saying "every good story comes to an end."

zh.title: 曼城期待席尔瓦的故事"走向尾声"
zh.summary: 曼城助理教练佩普·莱因德斯强烈暗示中场球员贝尔纳多·席尔瓦可能在赛季末离开俱乐部，他使用了"每个好故事都会结束"的比喻。这表明曼城正在为席尔瓦在经过重要任期后的潜在离队做准备。

fr.title: Manchester City s'attend à ce que l'histoire de Silva se termine « bientôt »
fr.summary: Pep Lijnders, entraîneur adjoint de Manchester City, a fortement laissé entendre que le milieu Bernardo Silva pourrait quitter le club en fin de saison, utilisant la métaphore « toute belle histoire a une fin ». Cela suggère que City se prépare au départ potentiel de Silva après un mandat important.

de.title: Man City erwartet, dass Silvas Geschichte « zu Ende geht »
de.summary: Pep Lijnders, Assistenztrainer von Manchester City, hat stark angedeutet, dass Mittelfeldspieler Bernardo Silva den Verein am Ende der Saison verlassen könnte, wobei er die Metapher « jede gute Geschichte hat ein Ende » verwendet. Dies deutet darauf hin, dass City sich auf Silvas möglichen Abgang nach einer bedeutenden Amtszeit vorbereitet.

es.title: Manchester City espera que la historia de Silva llegue « a su fin »
es.summary: Pep Lijnders, entrenador asistente de Manchester City, ha insinuado fuertemente que el centrocampista Bernardo Silva podría dejar el club al final de la temporada, utilizando la metáfora « toda buena historia llega a su fin ». Esto sugiere que City se está preparando para la posible salida de Silva después de un mandato significativo.

title: FA Cup draw: City-Southampton; Chelsea-Leeds
summary: The FA Cup semifinals have been drawn, with Manchester City facing Southampton and Chelsea set to meet Leeds United. These matchups set up important contests for both Premier League powerhouses in their bids for the trophy.
content: Manchester City will face Southampton in the FA Cup semifinal, while Chelsea will meet Leeds United.

zh.title: 足总杯抽签：曼城-南安普顿；切尔西-利兹
zh.summary: 足总杯半决赛已进行抽签，曼城将对阵南安普顿，切尔西将迎战利兹联队。这些对阵为两支英超豪强争夺奖杯设定了重要的比赛。

fr.title: Tirage de la FA Cup : City-Southampton ; Chelsea-Leeds
fr.summary: Les demi-finales de la FA Cup ont été tirées au sort, avec Manchester City face à Southampton et Chelsea affrontant Leeds United. Ces appairements constituent des matchs importants pour les deux géants de la Premier League dans leur quête du trophée.

de.title: FA-Cup-Auslosung: City-Southampton; Chelsea-Leeds
de.summary: Das Halbfinale des FA Cup wurde ausgelost, wobei Manchester City auf Southampton trifft und Chelsea auf Leeds United trifft. Diese Paarungen stellen wichtige Spiele für beide Premier-League-Großmächte in ihrem Kampf um den Pokal dar.

es.title: Sorteo de la FA Cup: City-Southampton; Chelsea-Leeds
es.summary: Se ha realizado el sorteo de las semifinales de la FA Cup, con Manchester City enfrentándose a Southampton y Chelsea enfrentándose a Leeds United. Estos emparejamientos configuran contiendas importantes para ambas potencias de la Premier League en su pugna por el trofeo.

title: PSV clinch 3rd-straight Eredivisie in record time
summary: PSV Eindhoven secured their third consecutive Eredivisie title and 27th overall championship after rival Feyenoord failed to secure victory on Sunday. The dominant run underscores PSV's continued dominance in the Dutch league.
content: PSV Eindhoven were crowned Eredivisie champion for a third straight year and 27th time overall after their closest rival Feyenoord failed to win on Sunday.

zh.title: PSV创纪录时间内赢得第三个连续英超杯冠军
zh.summary: PSV埃因霍温在对手费耶诺德周日未能取胜后，获得了第三个连续英超杯冠军和第27个总冠军。这一连胜充分表明PSV在荷兰甲级联赛中的持续统治地位。

fr.title: PSV remporte sa 3e Eredivisie consécutive en temps record
fr.summary: PSV Eindhoven a assuré son troisième titre Eredivisie consécutif et son 27e titre global après que son rival Feyenoord n'ait pas réussi à remporter la victoire dimanche. Cette série dominante souligne la domination continue de PSV dans le championnat hollandais.

de.title: PSV sichert sich 3. aufeinanderfolgende Eredivisie in Rekordzeit
de.summary: PSV Eindhoven sicherte sich seinen dritten aufeinanderfolgenden Eredivisie-Titel und seinen 27. Gesamtmeisterschaftstitel, nachdem Rivale Feyenoord am Sonntag keinen Sieg erzielen konnte. Diese dominante Serie unterstreicht PSVs anhaltende Dominanz in der niederländischen Liga.

es.title: PSV conquista su 3er Eredivisie consecutivo en tiempo récord
es.summary: PSV Eindhoven aseguró su tercer título Eredivisie consecutivo y su 27o campeonato general después de que su rival Feyenoord no asegurara la victoria el domingo. Esta racha dominante subraya el dominio continuo de PSV en la liga holandesa.

title: Spirit score first win despite Rodman goal drought
summary: The Washington Spirit defeated Bay FC 2-0, with substitute Gift Monday scoring just two minutes after coming off the bench. The victory provided a bright spot for the team despite ongoing struggles in their attacking play.
content: Gift Monday scored just two minutes after entering the game as a late substitute and the Washington Spirit beat Bay FC 2-0 on Sunday.

zh.title: 美国精神队首场胜利，尽管罗德曼进球荒
zh.summary: 华盛顿精神队以2-0击败湾区足球俱乐部，替补球员Gift Monday在替补出场仅两分钟后就打进一球。这场胜利为球队提供了一个亮点，尽管他们在进攻方面持续存在问题。

fr.title: Spirit remporte sa première victoire malgré la sécheresse de buts de Rodman
fr.summary: Le Washington Spirit a battu Bay FC 2-0, avec le remplaçant Gift Monday marquant seulement deux minutes après son entrée en jeu. La victoire a offert une lueur d'espoir à l'équipe malgré leurs difficultés persistantes en attaque.

de.title: Spirit siegt trotz Rodmans Torflauute
de.summary: Der Washington Spirit besiegte Bay FC 2-0, wobei der Einwechselspieler Gift Monday nur zwei Minuten nach seiner Einwechslung traf. Der Sieg bot einen Lichtblick für das Team trotz anhaltender Probleme im Angriffsspiel.

es.title: Spirit logra su primera victoria a pesar de la sequía de goles de Rodman
es.summary: El Washington Spirit derrotó a Bay FC 2-0, con el suplente Gift Monday anotando solo dos minutos después de entrar al campo. La victoria proporcionó un punto brillante para el equipo a pesar de las luchas continuas en su juego ofensivo.

title: Serie A: Inter Milan rout Roma, go 9 points clear
summary: Inter Milan secured a decisive victory over Roma to extend their lead at the top of Serie A to nine points. The dominant performance reinforces Inter's commanding position in the Italian league title race.
content: null

zh.title: 意甲：国际米兰大胜罗马，领先9分
zh.summary: 国际米兰以决定性的胜利战胜罗马，将他们在意甲榜首的领先优势扩大到9分。这场占绝对优势的表现强化了国际米兰在意大利联赛冠军争夺战中的领先地位。

fr.title: Série A : L'Inter Milan écrase la Roma, 9 points d'avance
fr.summary: L'Inter Milan a remporté une victoire décisive sur la Roma pour étendre son avance en tête de la Série A à neuf points. La performance dominante renforce la position de commandement de l'Inter dans la course au titre de la ligue italienne.

de.title: Serie A: Inter Mailand schlägt Rom vernichtend, 9 Punkte Vorsprung
de.summary: Inter Mailand sicherte sich einen entscheidenden Sieg über Rom und erweiterte seinen Vorsprung an der Spitze der Serie A auf neun Punkte. Die dominante Leistung festigt Milans beherrschende Position im italienischen Ligentitelkampf.

es.title: Serie A: Inter Milán goleó a Roma, aventaja por 9 puntos
es.summary: Inter Milán aseguró una victoria decisiva sobre Roma para extender su ventaja en la cima de la Serie A a nueve puntos. La actuación dominante refuerza la posición de mando del Inter en la carrera por el título de la liga italiana.

title: Balogun fires Monaco to win amid late UCL push
summary: Folarin Balogun was instrumental in Monaco's 2-1 victory over Marseille, extending their winning streak to seven matches in Ligue 1. The result strengthens Monaco's push for Champions League qualification alongside fellow European contenders.
content: Folarin Balogun proved decisive for Monaco to extend their winning run in Ligue 1 to seven matches as they earned a 2-1 victory over fellow Champions League chasers Marseille.

zh.title: 巴洛贡助摩纳哥胜利，争夺欧冠资格
zh.summary: 福拉林·巴洛贡在摩纳哥2-1击败马赛的比赛中发挥了关键作用，将其在法甲的连胜纪录扩展到七场。这一结果加强了摩纳哥与其他欧洲竞争者一起争夺欧冠资格的动力。

fr.title: Balogun propulse Monaco vers la victoire dans la course à la Ligue des Champions
fr.summary: Folarin Balogun a été déterminant dans la victoire 2-1 de Monaco sur Marseille, prolongeant leur série de sept victoires consécutives en Ligue 1. Le résultat renforce la poussée de Monaco pour la qualification en Ligue des Champions aux côtés d'autres prétendants européens.

de.title: Balogun führt Monaco zum Sieg im Kampf um die Champions League
de.summary: Folarin Balogun war instrumental in Monacos 2-1-Sieg über Marseille und verlängerte damit ihre Siegesserie in der Ligue 1 auf sieben Spiele. Das Ergebnis stärkt Monacos Drang nach der Qualifikation für die Champions League neben anderen europäischen Konkurrenten.

es.title: Balogun impulsa a Mónaco a la victoria en la lucha por la Champions League
es.summary: Folarin Balogun fue clave en la victoria 2-1 de Mónaco sobre Marsella, extendiendo su racha ganadora a siete partidos en la Ligue 1. El resultado fortalece el empuje de Mónaco por la calificación de la Champions League junto a otros contendientes europeos.

title: Beckham: Inter Miami stadium 'dream come true'
summary: Inter Miami played their inaugural match at Nu Stadium, with co-owner David Beckham describing the milestone as a "dream come true." The team drew 2-2 with Austin FC in their historic first game at the new venue.
content: Inter Miami co-owner David Beckham spoke of a dream come true as his team played its first ever game at Nu Stadium on Saturday -- a 2-2 draw with Austin FC.

zh.title: 贝克汉姆：国际迈阿密球场"梦想成真"
zh.summary: 国际迈阿密队在核电站球场进行了首场比赛，共同所有者大卫·贝克汉姆将这一里程碑称为"梦想成真"。球队在新场地的历史性首场比赛中与奥斯汀FC战成2-2。

fr.title: Beckham : le stade de l'Inter Miami, « un rêve devenu réalité »
fr.summary: L'Inter Miami a joué son match inaugural au stade Nu, le copropriétaire David Beckham qualifiant cette étape historique de « rêve devenu réalité ». L'équipe a fait match nul 2-2 avec l'Austin FC lors de son premier match historique au nouveau stade.

de.title: Beckham: Inter Miami-Stadion ist ein „Traum wahr geworden"
de.summary: Inter Miami spielte sein Eröffnungsspiel im Nu Stadium, und Miteigentümer David Beckham beschrieb den Meilenstein als „Traum wahr geworden". Das Team spielte 2:2 gegen Austin FC in seinem historischen Erstspiel am neuen Austragungsort.

es.title: Beckham: El estadio del Inter Miami es un "sueño hecho realidad"
es.summary: El Inter Miami disputó su primer partido en el Nu Stadium, y el copropietario David Beckham describió el hito como un "sueño hecho realidad". El equipo empató 2-2 con Austin FC en su histórico primer partido en la nueva cancha.
